news.t: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies

holdings.infoBox: LOPP is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Vernova stock at 4.03%, IDACORP at 3.38%, Cameco at 3.20%, Crown Holdings at 3.18%, and Cummins at 3.11%.

overview.description: The Gabelli Love Our Planet & People ETF (LOPP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF of US-listed companies selected by combining ESG with value-oriented investing. LOPP was launched on Feb 1, 2023 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...
